title: Art appraisers in St. Louis, Missouri

listedAppraisers.name: Selkirk Auctions & Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Selkirk Auctions & Appraisers provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine Art, Antiques, Collectibles, Rugs, Memorabilia. With Over 15 years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

With Over a decade experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Valuations, Consignment-based sales. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Kodner Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Kodner Gallery is a nationally recognized fine art gallery and appraisal service in St. Louis, founded by the late Martin Kodner. Located in the heart of Ladue, the gallery specializes in fine American and European art of the 19th, 20th, and 21st centuries, including Impressionism, American Western, Regionalism, WPA, Ashcan Group, Hudson River, Post-War Modern, and Contemporary paintings, drawings, rare prints, and sculpture. They provide appraisal, restoration, conservation, and framing consultation services to collectors, corporations, and museums worldwide.

listedAppraisers.name: Fraley Fine Art Appraisal
listedAppraisers.description: Fraley Fine Art Appraisal has provided art appraisal services in the St. Louis area for over 56 years. They specialize in efficient and accurate art appraisals for a wide range of valuable items. Verified via Yellow Pages with positive customer reviews noting their professionalism and broad knowledge of different types of valuable items.

listedAppraisers.name: Alexander Gallery Inc
listedAppraisers.description: Alexander Gallery Inc is a long-standing art gallery in St. Louis with over 42 years in business. Located on Laclede Ave in the Central West End area, they offer art gallery services, dealer consultations, and appraisal services. Wheelchair accessible. Verified via Yellow Pages listing.
